theme_strategy: Dark mode strictly enforced. Aesthetic: Dark Cyber Finance / Terminal Brutalism. Inspired by Bloomberg terminals and modern IDEs. NO purple gradients.

rules.scale: Strict adherence to Tailwind scales. Headings tight tracking (-0.02em).
rules.data: All financial numbers, APYs, balances, and addresses MUST use the monospace font for tabular alignment.

visual_enhancers.textures: Apply a subtle CSS-based SVG noise/grain overlay across the app background to kill digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.patterns: Use CSS linear-gradient scan-lines or a very faint 1px grid background (`background-image: linear-gradient(to right, #222 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(to bottom, #222 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 40px 40px;`) on the hero or wrapper.
visual_enhancers.borders: Expose the skeleton. Use 1px sharp borders. Avoid soft, diffuse shadows. Prefer hard inner strokes or glowing 1px box-shadows on active states.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Only for sticky headers or modals. Must use deep black background (`bg-black/80`) with heavy blur (`backdrop-blur-2xl`) and a 1px solid top border. NEVER pure transparent.

grids_layouts.bento_grid: Dashboard uses a dense Bento grid structure (`gap-4` or `gap-1px` with `border-collapse` style for a technical look).
grids_layouts.cards: Cardless or flat cards with sharp edges (`rounded-sm` max) and 1px border. No floating soft shadows.
grids_layouts.spacing: Dense internal padding for widgets (`p-4` or `p-5`), generous margins between core sections (`py-12`).

health_factor_gauge.description: The CENTERPIECE. A highly visual semi-circle or radial gauge.
health_factor_gauge.details: Must feature colored zones (Safe: Green, Warning: Amber, Danger: Red). Include an interactive slider/marker natively inside or right below the gauge for the 'Automation Trigger Point'. Use bold JetBrains Mono for the score in the center.

automation_engine_card.details: Include a robust toggle switch. When active, apply a 'Tracing Beam' or subtle pulsing terminal green dot. Log activity in a terminal-like window inside the card (black bg, monospace green text).

lending_pool_dashboard.description: Market data for XLM, USDC, AQUA, yXLM.
lending_pool_dashboard.details: Use a data table or dense list. Align numbers strictly to the right. Use Recharts for mini sparklines/price tickers next to the asset names.

ai_risk_insights.details: Style like a retro-futuristic terminal feed or a Bloomberg chat window. Monospace text for volatility warnings.

buttons.details: Sharp edges (`rounded-sm`). Default to 1px borders with transparent bg for secondary. On hover, invert background and text colors (Terminal style). Use Steel Blue for primary positive actions.

motion.micro_interactions: Hover states must feel instant but smooth (150ms).
motion.health_gauge: Animate the gauge fill from 0 to current value on load.
motion.data_tickers: Highlight numbers briefly with a green/red flash when they 'update' to simulate real-time Stellar network feeds.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text, especially terminal green/amber on dark backgrounds, passes APCA/WCAG standards.
accessibility.data_testid: CRITICAL: Every interactive element (buttons, toggles, form inputs, list items) MUST have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='automation-toggle'`).

media.icons: Use `lucide-react`. Prefer crisp, technical icons (Terminal, Activity, ShieldAlert, Cpu).
media.images: Avoid generic stock photography. Rely on typography, grid structures, and data visualizations (charts/gauges) to provide visual interest.

3d_libraries.charts: Use `recharts` for all standard graphs (mini price tickers, utilization bars).
3d_libraries.gauge: Build the Health Gauge using SVG primitives + framer-motion, or customize a recharts RadialBarChart to look like a precise instrument.

instructions_to_main_agent: Wipe default Tailwind styles and implement the dark cyber finance color palette exactly as specified in the colors section.
Import Instrument Sans and JetBrains Mono fonts via Google Fonts in index.css.
Ensure `data-testid` is added to EVERY button, modal trigger, toggle, and significant data container.
Build the dashboard using a dense, technical grid layout. Avoid excessive whitespace inside data cards; make it feel like a pro trading terminal.
The Health Factor Gauge must be visually prominent. Prioritize its development and styling.
For the Automation Engine activity log, create a component that looks like a command-line interface (CLI).
Implement Sonner for toast notifications (e.g., transaction status updates) positioned at bottom-right.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not converge towards generic 'AI slop'. The UI must feel distinct, sharp, and highly technical.
Never apply `transition: all`. Use targeted transitions (e.g., `transition-colors`, `transition-transform`).
Do not center-align app containers (`.App { text-align: center; }` is forbidden). Left-align dense data.
Create depth through 1px borders and nested containers rather than soft drop-shadows.
Never use purely transparent backgrounds for overlays, dropdowns, or sticky headers. Always use `bg-background/90` with `backdrop-blur`.
Missing data must have skeleton loaders, not empty voids.
